description: This Java class defines configuration properties for Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) in the application. It uses Spring Boot's @ConfigurationProperties to map properties with the prefix 'app.mfa' from configuration files (such as application.properties) or environment variables. The class contains boolean settings to control OTP delivery, development fallback, and logging for OTP failures.

classes.name: MfaProperties
classes.description: Encapsulates MFA configuration settings, including OTP delivery, dev fallback, and logging behavior.

methods.name: isDeliveryEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether OTP delivery via notification providers is enabled.

methods.name: setDeliveryEnabled
methods.description: Sets whether OTP delivery via notification providers is enabled.

methods.name: isDevReturnOtp
methods.description: Returns whether the system should include OTP in responses for dev/test environments.

methods.name: setDevReturnOtp
methods.description: Sets whether OTP should be included in responses for dev/test environments.

methods.name: isLogOtpOnFailure
methods.description: Returns whether OTPs are logged in plaintext upon delivery failure.

methods.name: setLogOtpOnFailure
methods.description: Sets whether OTPs are logged in plaintext upon delivery failure.
